inputs.label: Mass Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: The mass flow rate of geothermal fluid from the production well.

businessContext_i18n.en: The mass flow rate of geothermal fluid from the production well.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim kuyusundan gelen jeotermal akışkanın kütlesel debisi.

inputs.label: Specific Heat Capacity
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat capacity of the geothermal fluid (water).

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific heat capacity of the geothermal fluid (water).

inputs.label: Inlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of the geothermal fluid at the wellhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of the geothermal fluid at the wellhead.

inputs.label: Outlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of the geothermal fluid after heat extraction (reinjection temperature).

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of the geothermal fluid after heat extraction (reinjection temperature).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Isı çekimi sonrası jeotermal akışkanın sıcaklığı (re-enjeksiyon sıcaklığı).

inputs.label: Conversion Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of converting thermal energy to electricity (typical binary plant 10-15%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of converting thermal energy to electricity (typical binary plant 10-15%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Termal enerjinin elektriğe dönüşüm verimliliği (tipik ikili santral %10-15).

inputs.label: Parasitic Load
inputs.businessContext: Power consumed by pumps and auxiliary equipment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Power consumed by pumps and auxiliary equipment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompalar ve yardımcı ekipman tarafından tüketilen güç.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
